mapper.select: SELECT comp_id, orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, remark, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY use_yn desc, ord_seq
SELECT orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, remark FROM dataset.tb_dataset_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{orgnRoleId} IS NULL or #{orgnRoleId} = '' THEN TO_CHAR(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(orgn_role_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text , 4, '0') ELSE #{orgnRoleId} END FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role WHERE orgn_role_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%' AND comp_id = #{compId} LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart_orgn_role( comp_id, orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm, remark, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by )VALUES( #{compId}, #{orgnRoleId}, #{orgnRoleNm}, #{remark}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, b.orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart a LEFT OUTER JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info b ON b.orgn_id = a.orgn_id WHERE a.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY a.use_yn DESC, a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.chart_id as chartId, a.chart_nm as chartNm, a.orgn_id as orgnId, a.confirm_yn as confirmYn, a.chart_data as chartData, a.chart_blob_data, to_char(a.created_at, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as createdAt, a.created_by as createdBy, to_char(a.updated_at, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as updatedAt, a.updated_by as updatedBy, substring(a.confirm_dt, 1, 11) as confirmDt, a.member_count as memberCount, a.comp_id as compId, a.use_yn as useYn, b.orgn_nm as orgnNm FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart a left outer join ESG.tb_orgn_info b on B.orgn_id = A.orgn_id WHERE a.chart_id = #{searchText}
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(chart_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as chart_id from esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart where chart_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart ( comp_id, chart_id, chart_nm, orgn_id, confirm_yn, chart_data, member_count, use_yn, created_at, created_by, chart_blob_data ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{chartId}, #{chartNm}, #{orgnId}, #{confirmYn}, #{chartData}, #{memberCount}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{chartBlobData} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart SET comp_id = #{compId}, orgn_id = #{orgnId}, chart_nm = #{chartNm}, chart_data = #{chartData}, member_count = #{memberCount}, use_yn = #{useYn}, confirm_yn = #{confirmYn}, chart_blob_data = #{chartBlobData},
confirm_dt = now(),
confirm_dt = '',
updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE chart_id = #{chartId}

UPDATE esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart SET confirm_yn = #{confirmYn},
confirm_dt = now(),
confirm_dt = '',
updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE chart_id = #{chartId}
